items.title: Gazprom reports profit growth in Q1
items.body: Gazprom showed strong growth and record profit in the first quarter.

items.title: Record profit confirmed for Gazprom
items.body: Analysts confirm profit increase and stable financial outlook for Gazprom.

items.title: Gazprom receives regulatory fine
items.body: The company faces a large fine and additional risk due to compliance issues.

items.title: Sber launches new regional office
items.body: The bank announced expansion in a regional market and development plans.

items.title: Sber net profit rises on retail growth
items.body: Sber posted profit increase with strong retail lending dynamics.

items.title: Yandex updates cloud services portfolio
items.body: The company introduced new cloud options for enterprise users.

items.title: Yandex reports strong quarterly results
items.body: Revenue growth and positive margin trend support optimistic expectations.

items.title: Nornickel reports temporary output decline
items.body: Production decline was linked to maintenance and short-term risk factors.

items.title: Nornickel expands investment program
items.body: The company plans development projects and expects long-term growth.

items.title: Lukoil proposes dividend payments
items.body: Investors reacted positively to stable dividend policy and profit outlook.
